info.long_name: Percentage of Outpatient Visits for COVID-Related Symptoms
info.short_description: Estimated percentage of outpatient doctor visits primarily about COVID-related symptoms, based on data from health system partners, smoothed in time using a Gaussian linear smoother
info.long_description: This data source is based on information about outpatient visits, provided to CMU/Delphi by health system partners. Using this outpatient data, CMU/Delphi estimates the percentage of COVID-related doctor's visits in a given location, on a given day. Percent of all unique outpatient visits with primary ICD-10 code of any of: U071, U072, B9729, J1281, Z03818, B342, J1289

delphi_doc_covid_smooth.long_name: Percentage of Outpatient Visits for COVID-Related Symptoms
delphi_doc_covid_smooth.short_description: Estimated percentage of outpatient doctor visits primarily about COVID-related symptoms, based on data from health system partners, smoothed in time using a Gaussian linear smoother
delphi_doc_covid_smooth.long_description: This data source is based on information about outpatient visits, provided to CMU/Delphi by health system partners. Using this outpatient data, CMU/Delphi estimates the percentage of COVID-related doctor's visits in a given location, on a given day. Percent of all unique outpatient visits with primary ICD-10 code of any of: U071, U072, B9729, J1281, Z03818, B342, J1289

delphi_doctor_visits.name: CMU Delphi COVIDcast - Doctor Visits
delphi_doctor_visits.organization: Carnegie Mellon University Delphi Research Group
delphi_doctor_visits.description: The Delphi Doctor Visits signal estimates the percentage of outpatient doctor visits with COVID-related diagnoses based on claims data from health system partners. CMU Delphi receives de-identified medical insurance claims data covering a significant fraction of United States healthcare visits. The signal is calculated as the percentage of outpatient visits with COVID-related ICD-10 diagnosis codes (U071, U072, B9729, J1281, Z03818, B342, J1289). Data are smoothed using a Gaussian linear smoother to reduce day-to-day noise. This signal provides near-real-time insight into COVID-19 activity at the community level based on actual healthcare encounters. Data are available at state and county levels with approximately 3-4 day lag from the date of service.
delphi_doctor_visits.restrictions: CC-BY Attribution license. Data may be used with attribution to the CMU Delphi Group.
